name: translatize
description: Manage your Translatize translations from Claude - read, search and edit labels, fill missing translations, and work with git-like branches.
long_description: The Translatize MCP server connects Claude Desktop to your Translatize translation-management project. Inspect the project and its languages, list/search/read/upsert translation labels, check per-language coverage, find and fill missing translations (yourself or with platform AI), and - with a create-own scoped token - create, compare, review, merge and delete branches. Authenticate with a Translatize integration API token (an "mcni_..." string) created under Project Settings -> Integrations; every token is bound to one project and base branch.

api_token.title: Translatize API token
api_token.description: Your Translatize integration API token (an "mcni_..." string). Create one under Project Settings -> Integrations at https://app.translatize.com. Each token is bound to one project and branch.

api_url.title: API base URL
api_url.description: Translatize API base URL including the /v1 segment. Leave as the default unless you run a self-hosted instance.
